task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The base.slvs part is linked into the assembly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'base.slvs' part geometry is visible in the 3D workspace, or an import/link group for 'base.slvs' is visible in the SolveSpace Property Browser.

task_completion.description: The side.slvs part is linked into the assembly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'side.slvs' part geometry is visible in the 3D workspace alongside the base part, or an import/link group for 'side.slvs' is visible in the SolveSpace Property Browser.

task_completion.description: The save dialog is configured with the correct path and filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is open, showing the directory navigated to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' and the file name set to 'box_assembly.slvs'.

task_completion.description: The assembly is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'box_assembly.slvs', or a file manager/terminal window confirms the file 'box_assembly.slvs' exists in '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the assembly
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through SolveSpace menus (e.g., 'New Group' -> 'Link / Assemble') rather than writing a script or text file to generate the .slvs file.

integrity.description: The parts were genuinely linked, not drawn from scratch
integrity.visual_evidence: The Property Browser shows imported/linked groups for the parts, rather than 2D sketches and extrusions being manually created by the agent.

integrity.description: The file was saved via the application, not faked via terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'box_assembly.slvs' is saved using SolveSpace's save functionality, not by running a command like 'touch box_assembly.slvs' in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use SolveSpace to create an assembly. The parts to be linked are located at '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/parts/base.slvs' and '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/parts/side.slvs'. The final file must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/box_assembly.slvs'. The task explicitly states that perfect alignment or adding constraints is NOT required.
